---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this dictionary project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I find it frustrating when I can't search by stroke count...")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g., "I would love a radical-picker UI to build Kanji visually.")

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. (Remember, this project focuses on JLPT N5 and uses a Pure Java UI).
